summary: AnalyticsService now emits project summary, scene metrics, and relationship graph data derived from outlines and draft text while scene-level caches in history/analytics/ memoize metrics per scene-id + content hash so repeated requests stay fast.

The renderer ships the Story Insights Dashboard (AnalyticsDashboard) with emotion/pacing visuals, the Corkboard of scene cards, and the Relationship Graph pane while the Snapshot/Verification modal now surfaces local metadata, sticky toasts, and dark-theme contrast for manual verification insights.

Insights surfaces the same local Story Insights data with the offline banner “Analytics service offline — using cached metrics,” and the Refresh Analytics control plus cached payloads keep the UI alive when FastAPI is unreachable without issuing new /analytics/* calls.
Passoff artifacts, tracker notes, and refinement documentation now capture both what ships and what is deferred for final verification.

backend.analytics: analytics_stub aggregates outline, drafts, and front-matter to compute summaries, scene metrics, and relationship nodes/edges.

surfaces: Story Insights dashboard (AnalyticsDashboard: summary rows, emotion graph, pacing strip, scene grid)
Corkboard scene cards (sceneId/title/index/word count + density ratios)
Insights analytics block with offline-aware messaging

tests.status: Passing in the service and renderer suites.
details: Server-side metric and endpoint coverage in pytest.
Renderer Vitest coverage for Story Insights surfaces (dashboard, corkboard, relationship graph), hidden-pane rules, valid endpoints, and regression sweeps.

e2e.notes: Phase 5 smoke spec covers export/integrity; future phases may add analytics e2e coverage.

deferred: Relationship graph layout/interaction beyond the current lightweight nodes/edges list.
Insights automation or import analytics beyond local metrics.

human_verification.notes: Manual GUI review pending for the caching/offline Story Insights flows; see work/phase6/verification_notes.md for ongoing notes.

artifacts: Renderer analytics components and test fixtures
